title: EMT - Paramedic Accreditation documents
text:
Commission on
Accreditation
of .Allied Health Education Prograrns
The Commission on Accreditation of Allied Health Education Programs, upon the recommendation of the Committee
on Accreditation of Educational Programs for the Emergency Medical Services Professions (CoA EMSP), verifies that
the following program
'Emergency :M.ed'ica{'leclinician - Paramed'ic
Natrona{Co{Ce,ge of'Ieclinica{Instruction-Sisityous County
'Weed; C.'A
is judged to be in compliance with the nationally established standards and awarded continuing accreditation on July
18, 2013.
Cameron Harris, RPSGT Douglas K. York, NREMT-P, PS, (NAEMT)
President, CAAHEP Chair, CoA EMSP
Emergency Medical Technician - Paramedic National College of Technical
Instruction-Siskiyous County, Weed, CA

-- 1 of 2 --

AMY STACHER
OBJECTIVE
Emergency Medical Services Lead Instructor Position
EXPERIENCE
2001- present Etna Ambulance, College of the Siskiyous & NCTI
Paramedic, EMT Basic, EMR Instructor
• Includes basic first aid & BLS classes; ACLS, PALS, AMLS, GEMS,
PEPP,ITLS
■ Work closely with students & other instructors to plan & instruct
• Willing to travel to different locations to teach
2001- present Fairchild Medical Center
Clinical Instructor
• Instruct hospital staff on various topics including ACLS, PALS, BLS
2000 - present City of Etna Ambulance & Mt Shasta Ambulance
Paramedic
• Direct prehospital patient care
• Have served in several roles over the years including Director, FIO,
Training officer, HIPPA officer, supplies, collections, billing
EDUCATION
• 1984 Etna High School Graduate
• 1984-1987 Shasta College Medical Assisting Education; AA degree
completion
• 1989-1993 Butte College & CSU Chico; Pre-med biology
• 2000-2002 College of Siskiyous EMT & Paramedic training; AS degree
completion
• 2005 NCTI; National EMS Educators Instructor 40 hour course
completion
REFERENCES
Available upon request
FAX (530) 467-5525 • E-MAIL STACHER@SISKIYOUS.EDU
233 ISLAND ROAD• ETN,\, CA 96027 • PHONE (530) 598-1167
